train_pairs.source: me ncí nɔ̂ː ntɔ᷅ fɔ̀wǎy bvúmbòn.
train_pairs.target: On Bvumbon, I came to the market.

train_pairs.source: wɔ̀ nǔ yúː cɔ́ŋ kèŋkfǔ bvúsɔ̀w.
train_pairs.target: On Bvusɔw, you(sg) will steal the yam.

train_pairs.source: kwɔ᷆ːn nǔ bóy fí me bvúzhí.
train_pairs.target: On Bvuzhi, the woman will help me.

train_pairs.source: wvù tɔ̀ nɔ̂ː bɔ᷅ŋ ŋwà bvûŋka᷆ː.
train_pairs.target: On Bvuŋka, he found the book.
The day after tomorrow is Bvutfu.

train_pairs.source: me nú mbóy ncáw mutù bvútfu᷅.
train_pairs.target: On Bvutfu, I will choose the car.
You(sg) heard the thief a long time ago.

train_pairs.source: cɔ̌ŋ nú bóy bɔ́ŋ bèsèn bvûŋka᷆ːde᷆n.
train_pairs.target: On Bvuŋkaden, the thief will find us.
The man is about to see him.
The day before yesterday was Bvuŋka.
I am about to help the man.

train_pairs.source: kwɔ᷆ːn cǐ nɔ̂ː yɛ᷅n wáy é bvútfu᷅.
train_pairs.target: On Bvutfu, the woman saw the market.

train_pairs.source: bèsèn nǔ géː cɔ́ŋ mutù ɛ̀bɛ̀n.
train_pairs.target: Today, we will steal the car.

train_pairs.source: bɔ́ nɔ̂ː yɛ᷅n me lé fɔ̀wǎy.
train_pairs.target: They saw me at the market just now.

test_pairs.target: Bvusɔw is the day after tomorrow.
Today, I will see the yam.

test_pairs.source: me nú ŋgéː nyɛ́n kèŋkfǔ lé ɛ̀bɛ̀n.
wvù tɔ̀ nɔ̂ː yɛ᷅n bèsèn ě bvúmbòn.
test_pairs.target: On Bvuzhiden, we will come to the market.

test_pairs.source: bèsèn nǔ bóy tɔ́ fɔ̀wǎy bvúzhı᷇ːde᷆n.

notes:
Original query:  Translate into English:

spoken on Bvuŋkaden
16. bvúsɔ̀w nǔ fɔ̀ shě ntfǔː.
17. me nú ŋgéː nyɛ́n kèŋkfǔ lé ɛ̀bɛ̀n.
18. wvù tɔ̀ nɔ̂ː yɛ᷅n bèsèn ě bvúmbòn.
19. bèsèn nǔ bóy tɔ́ fɔ̀wǎy bvúzhı᷇ːde᷆n.
